name: Maryland Crab Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onion and leeks with 6 cups of water.
2. Add beef broth, Old Bay seasoning, tomato, string beans, celery, corn, carrots, and potatoes to the pot. Stir well to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let it simmer for 1 hour and 30 minutes.
4. Add crab meat to the soup and continue simmering for another 1 hour and 30 minutes until all ingredients are tender and flavors have melded together.
